entries.current_position: RP-C06 is COMPLETE with all seven missions PROVEN. AJ-09 and CAP-019/CAP-020 are accepted. RP-C07 is IN_PROGRESS and must reconcile every AJ-01 through AJ-12 disposition from exact canonical evidence without inferring availability from code or generated reports.

RP-C01-M08 routine Jayson carrier dependency retirement is unproven.
entries.next_action: Build the RP-C07 AJ-01 through AJ-12 disposition matrix from current canonical proof, preserving PROVEN, BLOCKED, and UNPROVEN boundaries and independent RP-C01 blockers.
